mapper.select: select category_id as id, parent_id as parentId, category_name as label, order_num as orderNum, if(status = '1', true, false) as disabled from ast_asset_category where del_flag = '0' and status = '0' and asset_type = #{assetType} order by ancestors asc, order_num asc, category_id asc

select dept_id as id, parent_id as parentId, dept_name as label, order_num as orderNum, if(status = '1', true, false) as disabled from sys_dept where del_flag = '0' and status = '0' order by parent_id asc, order_num asc, dept_id asc

select u.user_id as value, concat(ifnull(nullif(u.nick_name, ''), u.user_name), if(d.dept_name is null or d.dept_name = '', '', concat('（', d.dept_name, '）'))) as label from sys_user u left join sys_dept d on u.dept_id = d.dept_id where u.del_flag = '0' and u.status = '0'
and (u.user_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or u.nick_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by u.user_id asc limit 50
